Title: npm About

URL Source: https://npmjs.com/about

Markdown Content:
npm, Inc. is a company founded in 2014, and was acquired by GitHub in 2020. npm is a critical part of the JavaScript community and helps support one of the largest developer ecosystems in the world.

npm is lots of things.

*   npm is the package manager for [Node.js](http://nodejs.org/). It was created in 2009 as an [open source project](https://github.com/npm) to help JavaScript developers easily share packaged modules of code.

*   The npm Registry is a public collection of packages of open-source code for Node.js, front-end web apps, mobile apps, robots, routers, and countless other needs of the JavaScript community.

*   npm is the command line client that allows developers to install and publish those packages.
